name: SecureSkillHub
description: Security-first directory of AI agent skills and MCP servers with multi-agent verification.
instructions: Start by reading site/entry.md for the progressive disclosure flow. For quick results, use packages/ first (~5KB each). Use v2/meta/ for catalog browsing (~70KB each). Avoid full catalog files (4-9MB) unless necessary. Do NOT parse index.html — it is a human-facing frontend. All paths are relative to the repository/site root.
